# tooling-core Review Context
<!-- Generated by code review chain. Input for dependent plugin reviews. -->

## Key Contracts

### PluginDescriptor (`src/cli/types.ts`)
```ts
interface PluginDescriptor {
  name: string;
  description: string;
  options: PluginOption[];
  parseOptions?(passthrough: string[], config: RunConfig): Record<string,unknown>;
  validate?(config: RunConfig & Record<string,unknown>): void;
  afterRun?(config: RunConfig, stats: RepositoryStats): Promise<void>;
}
```
All three methods are **optional** (README UML omits the `?` — misleading).

### runCli (`src/cli/runCli.ts`)
```ts
runCli(options: RunCliOptions): Promise<void>
// RunCliOptions = { descriptor: PluginDescriptor; processor: FileProcessor; argv?: string[] }
```
Flow: parses argv → builds RunConfig → resolves file list → runs RepositoryRunner → calls `afterRun` → link validation via `runLinkValidation`.

### FileProcessor (`src/repository/types.ts` AND duplicated in `src/repository/RepositoryRunner.ts`)
```ts
interface FileProcessor<TConfig extends RunConfig> {
  process(filePath: string, config: TConfig): string | ProcessingStatus;
}
```
**Defect:** defined identically in two files. Use `types.ts` as the canonical source.

### RunConfig (`src/repository/types.ts`)
```ts
interface RunConfig {
  runMode: "update" | "check";
  mode: "single" | "recursive";
  verbose: boolean;
  quiet: boolean;
  debug: boolean;
  validateExternalLinks: boolean;   // default: true
  linkTimeoutMs: number;            // default: 3000
  target: string;
  extensions: string[];
  excludeDirs: string[];
  positionals: string[];
  passthrough: string[];
}
```

### onDebug callback contract
`debugLog(config, msg)` in `src/util/debugLog.ts` writes `[debug] ${msg}\n` to stderr when `config.debug === true`. Plugins receive this indirectly via `onDebug?: (msg: string) => void` in `LinkValidationOptions`. **`runLinkValidation.ts` manually replicates the `[debug]` format inline instead of reusing `debugLog` — dependency plugins should not copy this pattern.**

### validateExternalLinks default
`parseStandardCli.ts` defaults `validateExternalLinks: true`. The default is **not documented** in README or CLI-BEHAVIOR.md. Plugins in the framework perform live HTTP requests unless `--no-external-link-check` is parsed. All dependent plugins should declare and handle this flag.

### listFilesToProcess default-file fallback
When no positional argument is provided in single-file mode, `listFilesToProcess.ts:21` defaults to `README.md`. Not documented anywhere.

---

## Known Issues

### Correctness
- **`createTransformProcessor` check-mode bug**: uses `config.check === true` (an undocumented optional boolean on an extended type) rather than `config.runMode === "check"`. A caller passing a plain `RunConfig` will never trigger check mode. All dependent plugins using `createTransformProcessor` should verify check-mode handling.
- **`--no-external-link-check` / `--link-timeout-ms` shown in `--help` but cause `"Unknown option"` error** unless the plugin explicitly declares them as `PluginOption` entries. The framework shows them as standard options but does not parse them centrally.
- **`--version` parsed (`parsed.version === true`) but `runCli.ts` never checks it** — silently falls through to normal processing.

### Package hygiene
- **`prepack` hook missing** from `package.json`. `dist/` will not rebuild before `npm publish`.
- **No `"private": true`** in `package.json` despite TECH-STACK.md declaring the package unpublished. `publishConfig.access: "public"` means it would publish publicly if triggered.

### CI
- `test-npm-token.yml:32` — `cat "$NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG"` may leak `.npmrc` token to CI logs.
- `test-npm-token.yml:41-44` — `npm publish` fires unconditionally on `workflow_dispatch`.

---

## Canonical Patterns

### Check mode (use everywhere)
```ts
if (config.runMode === "check") { ... }
```
Do NOT use `config.check === true` (that is a `createTransformProcessor`-specific deviation).

### Error message extraction (should be a shared util)
```ts
const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
```
Currently duplicated in `runCli.ts:25`, `createRunnerPolicy.ts:33`, `RepositoryRunner.ts:59`. Dependent plugins should not copy this inline.

### Debug logging
Use `debugLog(config, msg)` from `src/util/debugLog.ts` for plugin-side debug messages.
Pass `(msg) => debugLog(config, msg)` as the `onDebug` callback to `LinkValidationOptions`.

### Exit behavior
- `process.exitCode = 1` (non-terminating) — set in `RepositoryRunner` and `runLinkValidation` to signal failure while allowing cleanup to complete.
- `process.exit(1)` (terminating) — only in `attempt()` inside `runCli.ts` for unrecoverable structural errors.

### Output status strings (must match exactly)
```
Updated: <path>
Up-to-date: <path>
Needs update: <path>
Skipped (no markers): <path>
ERROR: <message>
[debug] <message>   ← stderr only
```

### Summary line (recursive + verbose only)
```
Summary: N updated, N needs update, N unchanged, N skipped
```
**Note:** current implementation (`createRunnerPolicy.ts`) prints summary in ALL recursive runs (not verbose-gated). This is a CLI-BEHAVIOR violation — dependent plugins should be aware.

---

## Doc Gaps

- `ProcessingStatus` value: README says `"needs update"` (space); actual type is `"needsUpdate"` (camelCase).
- README code example processor returns non-compiling `ProcessingStatus` strings.
- `buildPassthroughMap`, `parseStringOption`, `parseBooleanOption`, `parseNumberOption`, `runPlugin`, `runLinkValidation`, `createRunnerPolicy`, `createTransformProcessor` — all exported from index, none documented in README.
- `WalkOptions`, `RepositoryRunnerOptions` — appear in README UML but not exported from `src/index.ts`.
- `DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_DIRS` not exported from `src/index.ts`.
- `FileLineRef` in README UML but not exported (`no export` keyword in source).
- `validateExternalLinks` default, `listFilesToProcess` fallback, `--version` behavior — all undocumented.

---

## DESIGN-PRINCIPLES Conformance

| Principle | Status |
|---|---|
| Bin files are `.js`, thin wrappers | N/A — tooling-core is a library, no bin |
| ESM-only, `"type": "module"` | ✓ Confirmed |
| No bundler, `tsc` output published | ✓ Confirmed |
| `prepack: "npm run build"` | **✗ Missing from package.json** |
| CLI Framework Pattern (PluginDescriptor + runCli + FileProcessor) | ✓ Correctly implemented |
| Check mode = byte-for-byte comparison | ✓ `RepositoryRunner` correct; `createTransformProcessor` **✗ deviates** |
| Marker Injection Pattern | ✓ `injectBetweenMarkers` correct |
| Progressive Disclosure | ✓ |

---

## CLI-BEHAVIOR Conformance

| Convention | Status |
|---|---|
| Single-file vs recursive modes | ✓ |
| Status strings (`Updated:`, `Up-to-date:`, `Needs update:`, `Skipped (no markers):`) | ✓ |
| Default output: only `Updated:` lines | ✓ |
| `--verbose`: all statuses + summary (recursive only) | **✗ Summary prints in ALL recursive runs regardless of `--verbose`** |
| `--quiet`: no output | ✓ |
| `--debug`: `[debug]` to stderr, orthogonal | ✓ (`runLinkValidation.ts` partially deviates — mixed channels) |
| `--check`: no writes, exits non-zero | ✓ |
| External link validation default on | ✓ (but undocumented) |
| Exit codes 0/1/non-zero | ✓ |
| `ERROR: <message>` format | ✓ |
| Deterministic traversal, `node_modules` excluded | ✓ |
